name: English
help: 🐱 Welcome to Uploader! This bot can upload your files to the log channel. Commands: /help - Send this help info /settings - Choose a language. /dl - Download and process URLs from a text file link. /cancel - Cancel an active batch download. Take a look at my channel @atashare and @atabots for interesting websites and update notes!
uploading: File downloaded successfully. Now uploading to log channel...
error: 😥 Transfer failed! Maybe the server is overloaded or network isn't stable now, please try later.
flood_protection: 🚫 Please wait for the current files to finish uploading. Up to {1} file(s) in parallel is allowed.
langSetText: √ Language set to English. Send /help to see what I can do!
help_settings: Tap the buttons below to see description and corresponding options.
help_setLang: To contribute translations, please check the guides on GitHub.
animatedStickers: Animated stickers are stored in .tgs format, and I currently can't convert them. Please edit the extension yourself if the file appears abnormal. You can use online converter or bots (like @tgstogifbot) to convert tgs to gif.
fileNotDetected:
No available files detected in the message.

Supported file types: documents, videos, audio, static stickers, GIF. 
Telegram server converts GIFs to mp4, so I upload them as videos.
stats: 📊 Stats Total users: {1} Transfers in progress: {2} Total transfers: {3} Your transfers: {4}
error_banned: You are banned from using this bot.
error_outOfMemory: The server is out of memory now. Please try again later.
banned: User is now banned from using this bot.
sendMeAFile: 👋 Send me a file to upload. Send /help to see what I can do!
error_unauthorized: You are not authorized to use this bot.
